user.title: Create Protect webhook bridge
user.description: Create a Home Assistant webhook endpoint for UniFi Protect Alarm Manager. Use HTTP POST in Protect when possible so the bridge can normalize motion, person, animal, vehicle, package and related detections more reliably.

reconfigure.title: Regenerate webhook bridge
reconfigure.description: Regenerate the webhook endpoint for UniFi Protect Alarm Manager. New webhook URL: {webhook_url}

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single HA Protect Bridge instance is supported.
abort.cloud_not_connected: Nabu Casa cloud is not connected.
